4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","zk","enforced-operator-flow",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","zk/enforced-operator-flow","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/12wk4.kub2_30.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07ch6ku1wly-d.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/127esg9z7tiwn.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable already live, but it is promoted proposal by proposal only after the stronger receipt set exists on chain."}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","h2","h2-18",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Exact Sequence"}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","ul","l-35",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-35-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Create the proposal normally."}],["$","li","l-35-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Record or upgrade the three DAO-authority receipts in `zk_enforced` mode:"}],["$","li","l-35-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"vote"}],["$","li","l-35-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"delegation"}],["$","li","l-35-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"tally"}],["$","li","l-35-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Inspect the proposal receipt state:"}],["$","li","l-35-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`PROPOSAL_PDA=\"$PROPOSAL_PDA\" npm run inspect:zk-proposal -- --proposal \"$PROPOSAL_PDA\"`"}],["$","li","l-35-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Lock the proposal into `zk_enforced`:"}],["$","li","l-35-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`PROPOSAL_PDA=\"$PROPOSAL_PDA\" npm run configure:zk-mode -- --proposal \"$PROPOSAL_PDA\" --mode zk_enforced`"}],["$","li","l-35-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Finalize through the correct path:"}],["$","li","l-35-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`PROPOSAL_PDA=\"$PROPOSAL_PDA\" yarn finalize -- --proposal \"$PROPOSAL_PDA\"`"}],["$","li","l-35-11",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Execute only after normal lifecycle success and timelock clearance:"}],["$","li","l-35-12",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`PROPOSAL_PDA=\"$PROPOSAL_PDA\" yarn execute -- --proposal \"$PROPOSAL_PDA\"`"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","h2","h2-38",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Receipt Strength Rule"}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","p","p-41",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Parallel receipts are not enough for `zk_enforced`."}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","p","p-43",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"A proposal can only move into `zk_enforced` when:"}]}],["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","ul","l-49",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-49-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"vote receipt is `zk_enforced` and recorded by the DAO authority"}],"$L21","$L22"]}]}],"$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e"]}]}]}]
21:["$","li","l-49-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"delegation receipt is `zk_enforced` and recorded by the DAO authority"}]
22:["$","li","l-49-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"tally receipt is `zk_enforced` and recorded by the DAO authority"}]
23:["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","p","p-50",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"If even one receipt is still only `parallel`, the stronger finalize path must remain blocked."}]}]
24:["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","h2","h2-54",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Operator Checks"}]}]
25:["$","$1","block-14",{"children":["$","p","p-57",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Before enabling `zk_enforced`, confirm:"}]}]
26:["$","$1","block-15",{"children":["$","ul","l-66",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-66-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the proposal PDA is correct"}],["$","li","l-66-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"all three receipt PDAs exist"}],["$","li","l-66-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"each receipt is proposal-bound"}],["$","li","l-66-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"each receipt is in `zk_enforced` mode"}],["$","li","l-66-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"each receipt was recorded by the DAO authority"}],["$","li","l-66-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the verifier program field is present for the stronger receipts"}]]}]}]
27:["$","$1","block-16",{"children":["$","h2","h2-69",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"What This Does Not Claim Yet"}]}]
28:["$","$1","block-17",{"children":["$","p","p-72",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"This flow does not claim that full Groth16 verifier enforcement is already the final canonical boundary on chain."}]}]
29:["$","$1","block-18",{"children":["$","p","p-74",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"What it does provide today is:"}]}]
2a:["$","$1","block-19",{"children":["$","ul","l-82",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-82-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal-bound on-chain proof anchors"}],["$","li","l-82-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"DAO-authority on-chain verification receipts"}],["$","li","l-82-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"stronger receipt mode hierarchy"}],["$","li","l-82-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal-level policy locking"}],["$","li","l-82-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"a distinct finalize path for `zk_enforced`"}]]}]}]
2b:["$","$1","block-20",{"children":["$","h2","h2-85",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Why This Matters"}]}]
2c:["$","$1","block-21",{"children":["$","p","p-88",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"This operator flow makes the stronger path usable without breaking existing governance."}]}]
2d:["$","$1","block-22",{"children":["$","p","p-90",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"It gives reviewers and operators a deterministic sequence for:"}]}]
2e:["$","$1","block-23",{"children":["$","ul","l-97",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-97-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"inspecting receipt strength"}],["$","li","l-97-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"enabling the stronger policy"}],["$","li","l-97-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"finalizing with the stronger path"}],["$","li","l-97-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"keeping the remaining blockers explicit"}]]}]}]
